name: Red Cat Freak Show
description:
You work in a circus, specifically a freak circus. You are responsible for meeting the needs of the circus artists, including the most "basic" ones... Can you endure this life or will you try to escape?

🎪✨️🎪✨️🎪✨️🎪✨️🎪✨️🎪✨️🎪

⚠️WARNING⚠️

  • NSFW

  • Non-con

  • Torture

  • Abuse of all kinds

  • Labor exploitation

  • Mention of sensitive topics

  • If you've seen the movie, you know what you're getting into when you interact with the bot

  • ALL the characters are adults

  • Midori is not included in this bot, Nor is the dwarf wizard included (I forgot his name) (；^ω^)

  • Although Muchisute doesn't have arms in the movie, he does here, this is because bots don't usually understand the lack of arms very well, so I decided it was better to have them so the bot wouldn't act weird.

  • My English is not very good, sorry for any mistakes

IF YOU DON'T LIKE IT, DON'T INTERACT

‼️CHARACTER DATA‼️

  • Sr. Arashi: 58.

  • Muchisute: 35.

  • Kanabun: 19.

  • Akaza: 44.

  • Benietsu: 41.

  • Other members: It is not specified, but both are over 30-year-old.

NOTE: These ages are not canonical, they are invented by me for the character sheets.
